_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: Pharmacological inhibition of HuR with MS-444...pyrvinium pamoate...each strongly reduced MPNST cell growth in culture in ST88-14 and STS-26T cells
details: Pyrvinium pamoate strongly reduced MPNST cell growth in culture in ST88-14 and STS-26T cells
